batch_atomicity_policy_for_future_write.description: Future Batch 1A consolidated write must record per-dataset write order and completion status. If a partial write occurs, stop remaining writes, generate partial-completion evidence and rollback manifest, and wait for explicit human decision to accept partial state or authorize rollback deletion.
